channel.title: Kosmopoisk on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Kosmopoisk on Alien Truth Social

item.title: UFOCOM or Belarusian UFOlogical Community
item.description:
The UFOCOM, or Belarusian Ufological Community, is a non-commercial, non-government public organization founded in 2001 in Horki, Belarus. It originated from students studying paranormal phenomena and has grown into a statewide network of volunteers conducting research. Since 2005, UFOCOM has been part of the Kosmopoisk international movement, serving as a public node for UFO research in the CIS network. The organization focuses on studying anomalous phenomena, including UFOs, crop circles, and poltergeists, and conducts research in cooperation with the National Academy of Sciences of Belarus.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/UfoCom
